findings.description: Validation error messages use Tailwind `text-red-400` instead of `var(--color-status-error)`. Consistent with existing login.tsx and anomaly components but inconsistent with structural error patterns elsewhere in the clusters tab.
Pods page duplicates the cube SVG icon inline in two places (line 74-80 and 186-192). Could extract to a shared component for DRY.
Azure 'Cluster Name' placeholder shows an endpoint URL (https://myaks.eastus.azmk8s.io) which is confusing for a 'name' field. Should show a name like 'my-aks-cluster'.
The empty catch block in the presence handler silently swallows errors. While intentional per the comment, a debug-level log could help with future troubleshooting.

summary: Two clean commits fixing 6 UX issues and an SSE disconnect race condition. No architecture violations (migrate only in comments, values.yaml migrate.enabled=false). CSS variables used correctly throughout. Motion imports from 'motion/react' not 'framer-motion'. DataTable emptyIcon/emptyDescription/emptyAction props used correctly per component API. Loading skeleton, 404 page, unreachable banner, stale badges, and rich empty states are all well-implemented. AddClusterWizard validation with touched state + submitAttempted is a proper UX pattern. Presence fix uses idempotent destroyed flag with correct cleanup ordering and AbortError suppression. E2E selectors verified: 'loading cluster details', 'fill the required credential fields to continue' text both still present. No E2E orphans. No security issues. No blocking findings.
